Home / Services / Electrical Installations

Electrical Installations

Professional electrical installation services for homes and businesses in Boise.

Whether you're building a new home, remodeling your existing space, or simply need to upgrade your electrical system, Lightning Electric Inc provides expert electrical installation services. Our team has the knowledge and experience to handle any installation project, from simple outlet replacements to complex wiring systems. With Boise's rapid growth and new construction in areas like Harris Ranch, we stay up-to-date on the latest codes and technologies.

We offer a full range of electrical installation services, including wiring, lighting, outlets, switches, circuit breakers, panels, and more. We use only high-quality materials and follow strict safety standards to ensure your electrical system is installed correctly and safely. Our goal is to provide you with a reliable and efficient electrical system that meets your needs and exceeds your expectations.

From installing new recessed lighting in your kitchen to wiring a new addition to your home, Lightning Electric Inc is your trusted partner for all your electrical installation needs. Contact us today to discuss your project and receive a free estimate.

Our Process

  1. 01 Step 1: Consultation to discuss your installation needs.
  2. 02 Step 2: Detailed planning and design of the electrical system.
  3. 03 Step 3: Professional installation by licensed electricians.
  4. 04 Step 4: Thorough inspection and testing to ensure safety and functionality.

Benefits

  • Expert installation services
  • High-quality materials
  • Strict adherence to safety standards
  • Reliable and efficient electrical systems

Frequently Asked Questions

Do you offer electrical inspections for new homes?

Yes, we offer comprehensive electrical inspections for new homes to ensure everything is up to code and functioning properly.

What types of lighting installations do you offer?

We offer a wide range of lighting installations, including recessed lighting, pendant lighting, track lighting, landscape lighting, and more.

Can you install a new electrical panel?

Yes, we can install new electrical panels to upgrade your electrical system and meet your power needs.

Get a Free Estimate

Ready to get started with electrical installations? Contact us today.

Request Quote Or call: +12085716040
